title: Mystic Runes
description: Use magical runes to become more powerful!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4afc7b8bd0db2596520d1cd74e43c678a08ec29c.png) 

**Mystic Runes is a magical mod that enhances gameplay by adding runes that can be inserted into armor and weapons. Using new workstations, players can upgrade gear, depending on their playstyle.**


🪄 Key Features:

- 🔮 Over 10 runes with unique effects like flame, ice, ender and more.
- ⚒️ New crafting stations: Runesmith Table, Rune Extractor, Essence Collector and the Runic Anvil.
- 🧭3 structures to explore.
- ⚔️ Face the Ancient Golem, a powerful new boss with unique attacks and rune-related rewards.
- 💎 Find the new Energy Ore and and use Energy Crystals to work with runes.
  


📘 Learn more about each rune and how to use them on the [Mystic Runes Wiki](https://mystic-runes.fandom.com/wiki/Mystic_Runes_Wiki).



❓Q&A:

Can i use this mod in my modpack?

Of course!

Will this mod be updated?

Yes, but not for other versions.

I have an issue / bug  / report / request, where can I send it?

You can write a comment here, or contact me through the wiki page.
